goal_text:
You are looking for information in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'leave after 08:15' and should go to 'stevenage'.
The train should leave on 'wednesday' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the 'expensive' price range and should 'include free parking'.
The hotel should be in the type of 'hotel' and should have 'a star of 2'.
Make sure you get 'postcode'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are looking for information in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should leave after 08:15 and should go to stevenage
The train should leave on wednesday and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get arrival time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should be in the expensive price range and should include free parking
The hotel should be in the type of hotel and should have a star of 2
